diagrams.title: Cloud Computing Architecture
diagrams.description: A diagram showing the different layers of cloud computing, including infrastructure, platform, and software as a service.
diagrams.purpose: To illustrate the different layers of cloud computing and how they interact with each other.

diagrams.title: Data Encryption Process
diagrams.description: A diagram showing the steps involved in encrypting data, including key generation, encryption, and decryption.
diagrams.purpose: To illustrate the process of data encryption and how it protects sensitive data.
